event_comments: Reviewed newsletter canonicalization wave 2026-03-21 (2003-2009) merged duplicate event 019b81b3-75e2-74de-8dfc-44f8a75b4300 ("Ultimate Orienteer #1 - Priest Pt. Park - Olympia").
